mapper.select: SELECT d.disposal_Id, f.foodMaterialName, fc.foodCategory, d.disposalCountAll, d.disposalPrice, d.disposalDate, r.reason_Id, r.reason FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id JOIN REASON r ON d.reason_Id = r.reason_Id ORDER BY d.disposal_Id DESC
SELECT f.foodMaterialName FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id
SELECT fc.foodCategory FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id

SELECT d.disposal_Id, f.foodMaterialName, fc.foodCategory, f.foodMaterialType, d.disposalCountAll, d.disposalPrice, d.disposalDate, r.reason FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id JOIN REASON r ON d.reason_Id = r.reason_Id WHERE fc.foodCategory = #{category} AND f.bId = #{bId}
mapper.update: UPDATE DISPOSALS SET reason_Id = #{reasonId} WHERE disposal_Id = #{disposalId}
mapper.select: SELECT d.disposal_Id FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.expirationDate < SYSDATE

SELECT NVL(ROUND(SUM(d.disposalCountAll) * 100 / NULLIF(SUM(f.foodMaterialCountAll), 0), 2), 0) AS disposalRate FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND d.disposalDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT NVL(SUM(d.disposalPrice), 0) as totalDisposalPrice FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id, f.foodMaterialName, SUM(d.disposalPrice) as totalDisposalPrice, SUM(d.disposalCountAll) as disposalCount FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY f.foodMaterial_Id, f.foodMaterialName ORDER BY totalDisposalPrice DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT r.reason_Id, r.reason, COUNT(*) as disposalCount, (COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER()) * 100 as reasonRatio FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN REASON r ON d.reason_Id = r.reason_Id JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY r.reason_Id, r.reason

SELECT d.disposalDate as disposalDay, SUM(d.disposalCountAll) as disposalCount, SUM(d.disposalPrice) as totalDisposalPrice FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY d.disposalDate ORDER BY d.disposalDate

SELECT d.disposalDate as disposalDay, f.foodMaterialType, SUM(d.disposalCountAll) as disposalCount, SUM(d.disposalPrice) as totalDisposalPrice FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY d.disposalDate, f.foodMaterialType ORDER BY d.disposalDate
